T0089.title: Record Lookup
T0089.definition: A service within underground data broker networks where a specified individual's personal records can be retrieved. For example, using just a phone number, the service can return associated identity information such as home addresses, bank account numbers, and registered assets. These services often include data lookups, decryption services, and forced account access.
